agencyAccess.title: Agenturzugriff
agencyAccess.subtitle: Sicht- und Bearbeitungszugriff dieser Mitarbeiter pro Agentur erteilen oder entziehen. Die Konvertierung von einem Kandidaten erteilt nicht automatisch — Schalter müssen explizit aktiviert werden.

confirmRevokeAll.title: Allen Agenturzugriff entziehen
confirmRevokeAll.description: Sowohl Ansehen als auch Bearbeiten werden ausgeschaltet, was den Zugriff dieser Agentur vollständig entfernt. Fortfahren?

confirmRevoke.title: Agenturzugriff entziehen
confirmRevoke.description: Zugriff von {{agency}} auf diesen Mitarbeiter entfernen? Ihre Benutzer sehen den Datensatz sofort nicht mehr.

promoteDialog.title: Promote to Candidate
promoteDialog.successBody: has been promoted from Lead to Candidate.
promoteDialog.successFooter: The profile is now visible to agency users, and the tier change has been recorded in the audit log.
promoteDialog.intro: will be promoted from Lead to Candidate. This grants agency users visibility. A holding agency will be assigned if configured.
promoteDialog.agencyHelp: The selected agency becomes responsible for this candidate and is recorded in Agency History.
promoteDialog.loggedNote: This action is logged and can be reviewed in Agency History.

step1.title: Personal Information
step1.subtitle: Your personal details and address

step1.livedAbroadQuestion: Have you lived in another country for 6 months or more within the last 12 months?

step2.subtitle: Phone, email and emergency contact

step9.additionalNotesPh: Anything else you'd like us to know...

step10.title: Document Uploads
step10.subtitle: Upload supporting documents (PDF, JPG, PNG — max 5MB)

step10.uploadHint: Upload clear scans of your passport, license, and qualifications.

step11.title: Review Your Application
step11.subtitle: Please review all details before submitting
step11.photoMissing: ⚠ No photo uploaded — please go back to Tab 1 and upload a photo (required).

fields.howDidYouHear: How did you hear about us

step11.declarationSubtitle: You must agree to all statements below before submitting your application.
step11.stmt1: I confirm that all information provided in this application is true, complete and accurate to the best of my knowledge.
step11.stmt2Pre: I consent to the collection and processing of my personal data for recruitment and employment compliance purposes in accordance with applicable data protection legislation.
step11.stmt3: I understand that providing false, misleading or incomplete information may result in my application being rejected or, if employed, in immediate dismissal.
step11.stmt4: I agree to provide my data and profile to other agencies, partners, or customers of the employer or the purposes of their selection process.
